mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, phone, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
